content:textarea:2:83.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:2:83.html: The Headliner Sponsor receives the highest level of visibility, recognition, and hospitality associated with GameDay Café. This exclusive partnership positions your organization as a lead supporter of The Salvation Army of the Midlands while aligning your brand with one of the region’s most iconic live-music fundraising events.
content:textarea:2:83.content: The Headliner Sponsor receives the highest level of visibility, recognition, and hospitality associated with GameDay Café. This exclusive partnership positions your organization as a lead supporter of The Salvation Army of the Midlands while aligning your brand with one of the region’s most iconic live-music fundraising events.

content:wysiwyg_basic:4:95.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:4:95.html:
• Reserved VIP table seating for up to 10 guests
  • Meet & Greet with the artists
  • Heavy hors d’oeuvres by Southern Way Catering
  • Full bar prior to the show (6:30–8:00 p.m.)
  • Wine and beer service at the table during the show
  • Top-tier Logo recognition across all event platforms and locations
  • Inclusion in major network media promotions
  • Prominent logo placement on all event promotional materials, including invitations
  • Table signage featuring your organization’s logo
  • Recognition in all GameDay Café social media event posts
  • Logo placement on The Salvation Army of the Midlands website
  • Recognition in The Salvation Army of the Midlands June newsletter
  • Marketing materials displayed at event check-in
  • On-stage Recognition with verbal acknowledgment by the emcee and Major Craddock prior to the show
